creator: stadtkind2@gmx.de
text:
FreeBSD 9.0-RC3 (well, any RC) hangs when I try to boot the CD on a Via EPIA M850 board.

Verbose boot ouput available at

http://pastebin.com/hf8pU5W9

Last line shown during boot is:

hdac0: Probing codec #1...

and then it completely freezes.

How-To-Repeat: Burn the amd64 iso and boot on a 64bit VIA Nano CPU.
